title: Luffy Meets the Guardians
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on luffy meets the guardians within the The Guardians of Zou storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Is that thing a huge ball of water!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's enough to flood this place! We've got to get to higher ground!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: around the same time, left leg of the elephant

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The sun will set at the rate we're going! Hang in there, nekozaemon!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Isn't this climb asking a bit much of a cat,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No no! Cats are rather proficient at climbing trees, remember?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The eruption rain that falls upon the ele- Phant's back....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Water's Bad News! NeKozaemon's gonna melt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Rain at all, if you want to be precise.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: The elephant, Zuneshaa, baths itself in water.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Meaning that that rain just now was actu- ally seawater.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The water collects in a filtration device in the center of the city and is carried in aqueducts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: All throughout the country, wherever run- ning water is needed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Fish often get sucked up along with the seawater, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Which means we don't ever have to worry about access to food!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi, straw hat! I'm kind of stuck in the forest, so...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Do me a favor and tell the captain about me and the others here! Ask him to come meet us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Bepo's a native of this island, but...

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Because he's a pirate, he's currently under the care of the boss of this forest, Mr. Cat viper!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Oi! quit it with the biting!

summary: Luffy Meets the Guardians: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
